topic: Metadata deep dive — every tag that matters

cta: Is your metadata complete? DM us to check.

#SyncMaster #AfricanComposers #SyncReady #min #MusicMetadata

slides.body:
Your track existed. Metadata doesn't make your music better.
It makes your music findable.
She never found it. In every sync database and brief-matching tool — metadata is how your track surfaces.

Here's why metadata is the invisible infrastructure. ↓ Without it, you're invisible.
Your music exists. The brief exists. They never meet.

WHAT NEEDS TO LIVE IN THE FILE (embedded metadata):
→ Title: exact, consistent across every platform
→ Artist/Composer: your name as it appears on your PRO

WHAT NEEDS TO LIVE IN YOUR CATALOGUE SYSTEM:
→ Duration: exact, to the second
→ Instrumentation: list every prominent instrument
→ Vocal vs.

slides.headline: Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.body: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
